UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2018 NOTICE OF THE SCHEDULING OF THE DEFAULT PROVE-UP DAMAGES/QUIET TITLE JUDGMENT HEARING OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: ERIC R. FLEMING, CLERK: A. MOK. REPORTER: GINA M. KESSLER, CSR#8136. (514)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RS LENDING, INC. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION IS GRANTED. LIS PENDENS RECORDED ON JULY 3, 2018 IS EXPUNGED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH PROPER PROCEDURE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT PROCEDURAL DEFECTS IN THE LIS PENDENS MAY BE CURED BY FILING A NEW LIS PENDENS WHILE A MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS PENDING. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH PROBABLE VALIDITY OF HIS CLAIM IRRESPECTIVE OF PROCEDURAL DEFECTS. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER BY NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 18, 2018.(501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Dismissal - No Appearance

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Continued To Jan-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APEARANCES:
Blair Will, 916.287.9500 for Defendant/Moving party RS Lending, Inc.
William Tanenbaum, 310.628.0989 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Steven Ho.

Discussed. Plaintiff did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RS LENDING, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action is GRANTED. Lis Pendens recorded on July 3, 2018 is expunged. Plaintiff failed to comply with proper procedure. Plaintiff failed to cite any authority for the proposition that procedural defects in the Lis Pendens may be cured by filing a new Lis Pendens while a motion to Expunge Lis Pendens is pending. Additionally, Plaintiff failed to establish probable validity of his claim irrespective of procedural defects. Moving party to submit a proposed order by no later than December 18, 2018.(501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-10-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of The Scheduling Of The Default Prove-Up Damages/Quiet Title Judgment Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Off Calendar
